task:
Implement the following plan:

# Plan: Global CVE Approval Admin-Only Setting

## Context

Currently, both ADMIN and SECCHAMPION users can approve vulnerability exception requests of any scope, including CVE_PATTERN (global CVE) exceptions that affect **all assets system-wide**. The user wants a configuration toggle on the Application Settings page to restrict CVE_PATTERN approvals to ADMIN-only when enabled. Default is OFF (current behavior preserved).

## Files to Modify

| Layer | File | Change |
|-------|------|--------|
| Entity | `src/backendng/.../domain/AppSettings.kt` | Add `globalCveApprovalAdminOnly` boolean field |
| Service | `src/backendng/.../service/AppSettingsService.kt` | Extend DTO, update get/update, add accessor |
| Controller | `src/backendng/.../controller/AppSettingsController.kt` | Extend request DTO |
| Approval | `src/backendng/.../service/VulnerabilityExceptionRequestService.kt` | Consume setting in auto-approval + manual approval |
| Frontend svc | `src/frontend/src/services/appSettingsService.ts` | Extend interface + update function |
| Frontend UI | `src/frontend/src/components/AppSettingsAdmin.tsx` | Add toggle switch |

## Implementation Steps

### 1. AppSettings Entity
**File**: `src/backendng/src/main/kotlin/com/secman/domain/AppSettings.kt`

Add after `baseUrl` field (line 30):
```kotlin
@Column(nullable = false, name = "global_cve_approval_admin_only")
var globalCveApprovalAdminOnly: Boolean = false,
```

Hibernate auto-migration creates the column. Update `createDefault()` to include the field.

### 2. AppSettingsService
**File**: `src/backendng/src/main/kotlin/com/secman/service/AppSettingsService.kt`

- Add `globalCveApprovalAdminOnly: Boolean` to `AppSettingsDto` (line 25)
- Include field in DTO construction in `getSettings()` (line 38) and `updateSettings()` (line 80)
- Change `updateSettings` signature to accept `globalCveApprovalAdminOnly: Boolean`
- Set `settings.globalCveApprovalAdminOnly = globalCveApprovalAdminOnly` in
